economic_notes: Kalum Logistics Park Limited Partnership established February 2021; Band advanced $1,850,000 for rail spur extension. Band operates gas bar, quarry, logistics park, ventures partnerships, and economic development group. Port of Prince Rupert Container Terminal Project Agreement trust fund held for economic development.
notes: Audit is qualified due to absence of an approved budget for the year ended March 31, 2021, as required by Canadian public sector accounting standards. Seven entities accounted for by modified equity method as government business enterprises (GBEs). Three entities fully consolidated. Prior year included one-time items: write down of Treaty investment ($9,253,335) and Treaty loan forgiveness ($9,326,024) netting to $72,689. Deferred revenue increased significantly to $4,983,836 primarily due to CMHC rapid housing funding ($3,333,859) and ISC ICMS funding ($1,540,743). GBE investees have December 31 year-ends, not March 31. total_government_transfers calculated as Province of BC + ISC + FNHA + DFO + CMHC = 10118024+6201317+1050588+553423+209629 = 18132981.
